### Shipped via
- T-cc-queue-gate-clear-on-close (S) — cc_queue.py — auto-clear gates referencing just-closed ticket id on cmd_done  `done` — _ungate_dependents added to cmd_done — scans pending tickets whose gate references just-closed id and nulls them. Retroactive sweep unstuck 6 tickets including T-cc-walk-02 (now Igor-claimable). 6 new
- T-uc-server-watchdog (S) — Igor watchdog: detect utility_closet_server down, relaunch  `done` — UtilityClosetWatchdog shipped — slow-tier push source, two-strike rule, 120s cooldown, IgorBase-inherited (avoids push_sources circular import). Live-validated: UC was dead at sprint start, relaunch_u

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._
